results.clue: Boy meets girl. Father says no. They go to Europe anyway. Entire Punjab gives permission eventually.
Eldest son marries a poor girl. Family is devastated. They fly to London to express this devastation at length.

claims.text: Eldest son marries a poor girl.

results.clue: Best friend is in love with your wife. He is also dying. He decides to help arrange the wedding anyway.

results.clue: Man disguises as a woman to be his own child's nanny. Sari. Discovery. Redemption. More sari.

results.clue: Village challenges the British Empire to a cricket match to avoid paying taxes. They win. Obviously.

results.clue: NASA engineer returns to his village. Is horrified. Fixes the water supply. Stays. NASA says nothing.

claims.text: NASA engineer returns to his village.

results.clue: Women's hockey team hates their coach. Coach has a secret. They win the World Cup. Everyone cries.

claims.text: Women's hockey team hates their coach.

claims.text: An entire family attends two weddings across four hours.

results.clue: Three college idiots. One is secretly a genius. This is discovered ten years later at a goat farm.
